allowlist.src/api/routes/billing.routes.ts: billing scoped by authenticated user/org subscription
allowlist.src/api/routes/billing.webhooks.ts: Stripe webhook ingress — no org context
allowlist.src/api/routes/gdpr.routes.ts: exports actor's own audit rows only

allowlist.src/api/routes/api-keys.routes.ts: keys scoped by userId with optional org membership check
SEC-12 org-scoped factory — eq(orgId) on every query
